compiled_state.title: UPDATE: add plain-language explanations before each infrastructure file write in Phase 3 SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
4d15-157d

## testing_mode
UPDATE

## What
Add 1-2 sentence plain-language display instructions before each infrastructure file write in SKILL.md.

## Locations and Explanations

### Phase 2 — Jira config write (~line 562)
Before: 'If the user provides a Jira project key, write jira.project=<KEY>...'
Add before it: 'Display to user: "jira.project — records your Jira project key so DSO can sync tickets automatically."'

### Phase 3 Step 2b — dso-config.conf (~line 718)
Before writing dso-config.conf, add display instruction:
'Display to user: "dso-config.conf — the workflow settings file that tells DSO how your project is structured (stack, test commands, CI setup). Written to .claude/dso-config.conf."'

### Phase 3 Step 2c — DSO Shim (~line 965)
Before the shim install bash block, add display instruction:
'Display to user: "Installing the DSO shim — a short command-line shortcut (.claude/scripts/dso) that routes all DSO operations to the plugin scripts. You will use this for running tickets, tests, and merges."'

### Phase 3 Step 2c — Hook Installation (~line 976)
Before the hook install section, add display instruction:
'Display to user: "Installing pre-commit hooks — automated quality checks that run before each git commit to verify tests pass and code has been reviewed. Required for the DSO enforcement pipeline."'

### Integration config (0487-f12b scope — if that story is already implemented)
Ensure any Figma/Confluence config writes added by 0487-f12b also have similar explanations. If 0487-f12b is not yet merged, note in a comment that explanations should be added alongside those config writes.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md — add display instruction paragraphs at each location above

## Acceptance Criteria
- 1-2 sentence explanation added before each of: dso-config.conf write, shim install, hook install, Jira config write
- test_file_explanation_present passes GREEN
